# MakeMyCV

> Free, ATS-friendly CV builder for the UAE job market.

MakeMyCV is a free web app for building an ATS-clean, UAE-formatted CV and matching it against a specific job description. No account or payment is required to build and download a CV.

Canonical URL: https://www.makemycv.ae

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.makemycv.ae/): Build a UAE CV and check it against a job description.
- [JD Match](https://www.makemycv.ae/jd-match): Paste a job description for a match score and a requirement-by-requirement heatmap of what your CV covers and misses.
- [Resume Checker](https://www.makemycv.ae/resume-checker): Upload a PDF CV to see how UAE applicant tracking systems parse and rank it.
- [Templates](https://www.makemycv.ae/templates): ATS-friendly CV templates formatted for UAE hiring.
- [Blog](https://www.makemycv.ae/blog): Guides on UAE CV format, ATS, and the Dubai and Abu Dhabi job market.

## Notes

- Building and downloading a CV is free, with no sign-up or watermark.
- JD Match and AI-improve send your text to the server for analysis.
